name: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
description: A path in a binary tree is a sequence of nodes where each pair of adjacent nodes has an edge. A node can only appear at most once in the path. The path does not need to pass through the root. Return the maximum path sum of any non-empty path.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [1, 3 * 10^4]. -1000 <= Node.val <= 1000.

performance.stress_intent: kill repeated downward-gain recomputation on deep positive comb trees
